issues.description: Assembly replacement, not a mod. Causes conflicts preventing mod loading.
issues.fixSuggestion: Remove from BaseMods. Use 'Reticle Memory Leak Fix' instead.

issues.description: Known to cause crashes, invisible agents, and invisible ordeals.
issues.fixSuggestion: Remove ALotOptimization if experiencing crashes or invisible entities.

issues.description: Breaks modded EGO weapon textures. Only useful for vanilla.
issues.fixSuggestion: Remove if using modded EGO weapons.

issues.description: Causes NullReferenceException when selecting agents in certain conditions.
issues.fixSuggestion: Remove Agent Delete if experiencing NullRef errors on agent selection.

issues.description: Known to cause numerous bugs including crashes and save corruption.
issues.fixSuggestion: Remove Bamboo Hatted Kim if experiencing unexplained crashes.

issues.description: Relatively new and potentially unstable. May cause save-related issues.
issues.fixSuggestion: Back up saves frequently when using this mod.

issues.description: Has a known stall bug. A bugfix version is available.
issues.fixSuggestion: Update to the latest version with the stall bugfix.

issues.description: Conflicts with Weapon Remakes when both are active.
issues.fixSuggestion: Remove one of the conflicting mods.

issues.description: Conflicts with The King in Binds and QingYuXie.
issues.fixSuggestion: Remove one of the conflicting mods.

issues.description: Conflicts with The King in Binds and QingYuXie.
issues.fixSuggestion: Remove one of the conflicting mods.
